tickets.subject: App crashes on report load
tickets.body: Our entire team is experiencing crashes when loading reports with large datasets. This is blocking our Monday review meetings. Needs urgent attention.

tickets.subject: How do I get started?
tickets.body: I signed up yesterday and I have no idea where to begin. Is there a getting started guide or onboarding walkthrough I am missing?

tickets.subject: Bulk export request
tickets.body: We manage over 200 client accounts and need to export all reports at once. The current one-at-a-time export is not workable for us at this scale.

tickets.subject: Performance degradation since v2.4
tickets.body: Since the v2.4 release last week our dashboard load times went from under 2 seconds to over 12 seconds. Something regressed in that release.

tickets.subject: Cannot find integration settings
tickets.body: I need to connect a new data source but I cannot find where integration settings live in the UI. The navigation is not intuitive.

tickets.subject: iOS crash on startup — urgent
tickets.body: After updating to the latest version our iOS users cannot open the app at all. Black screen then immediate crash. Affecting our whole mobile team.

tickets.subject: Onboarding checklist missing
tickets.body: All the competitors we evaluated have an onboarding checklist that guides new users through setup. We are missing that completely.

tickets.subject: Export feature for bulk data
tickets.body: Requesting CSV bulk export for all evidence clusters at once. Right now I am copying data manually which is very inefficient.

tickets.subject: Feature request: bulk tag assignment
tickets.body: Would love to be able to select multiple items and assign tags in bulk. Small thing but would save a lot of repetitive clicks.

tickets.subject: Memory leak on Android
tickets.body: Android app gets progressively slower over a 30-minute session. CPU usage climbs until the app becomes unresponsive. Definite memory leak.

tickets.subject: New user setup confusion
tickets.body: Just onboarded 5 new team members and all of them struggled with initial setup. They needed my help just to get to the main dashboard.

tickets.subject: Navigation redesign suggestion
tickets.body: The sidebar layout makes it hard to find key features. User management, integrations, and billing are all buried. Could these be top-level items?

tickets.subject: Crash when switching between projects
tickets.body: Reproducible crash: open project A, switch to project B, app crashes immediately. Happening on both iOS and Android. Team of 12 affected.

tickets.subject: Bulk export for client reporting
tickets.body: Our clients expect weekly reports. Without bulk export we spend 3 hours every Friday manually downloading and compiling individual exports.

tickets.subject: Getting started documentation
tickets.body: The documentation is sparse for first-time setup. We had to guess at configuration steps. A quickstart guide with screenshots would help enormously.

tickets.subject: Dashboard load time regression
tickets.body: Dashboard now takes 18 seconds to load on our enterprise account which has around 800 data points. This was under 3 seconds a month ago.

tickets.subject: Onboarding flow does not explain key concepts
tickets.body: New users do not understand what themes, clusters, or confidence scores mean. The onboarding should explain the core concepts before showing the interface.

tickets.subject: Where is the settings menu?
tickets.body: I spent 15 minutes looking for account settings. Finally found it hidden under the avatar menu at the bottom of the sidebar. Very non-standard location.

tickets.subject: Positive feedback — great product
tickets.body: Just wanted to say the product has genuinely changed how our team makes roadmap decisions. The evidence clusters are exactly what we needed.

tickets.subject: App freeze on data view screen
tickets.body: Data view screen freezes completely after about 30 seconds of scrolling through a large dataset. Force quit required every time. Reproducible.

tickets.subject: Bulk archive request
tickets.body: Need ability to archive multiple completed items at once. Archiving one by one when closing out a sprint is tedious.

tickets.subject: First week experience was rough
tickets.body: I almost canceled in my first week because I could not figure out the setup. A better onboarding would have saved that experience.

tickets.subject: Black screen after latest update
tickets.body: Latest release broke the app for half our team. They see a black screen on launch and cannot get past it. Please push a hotfix.

tickets.subject: Information architecture feedback
tickets.body: The menu structure does not reflect how PMs think about their work. Suggest grouping by workflow: Discover, Analyze, Plan, Ship.

tickets.subject: Export needed for compliance reporting
tickets.body: We need to export all our data for a compliance audit. The single-item export makes this a multi-hour manual task. Bulk export is a blocker for us.
